user.title: Set up HA Fleet Manager Agent
user.description: Enter the API key, the base domain and the language for the auto-generated dashboard. You can find the API key in the Fleet Manager dashboard under Settings → Agents.

data_description.api_key: At least 16-character key from the Fleet Manager dashboard.
data_description.base_domain: Your HA Fleet Manager domain, e.g. 'ha-fleet-manager.com'. The backend and relay URLs are derived automatically.
data_description.language: Language for the auto-generated 'Remote maintenance' dashboard. The default follows your Home Assistant language. Storage-mode dashboards cannot be re-translated later — remove and re-add the integration to change.

error.invalid_api_key: The API key must be at least 16 characters long.
error.invalid_base_domain: The domain must contain at least one dot and must not contain spaces (e.g. ha-fleet-manager.com).

abort.already_configured: HA Fleet Manager Agent is already set up.

init.title: Review remote-access request

accept.title: Accept request

abort.already_resolved: This request has already been answered.

grant_pre_authorization.name: Grant pre-authorization
grant_pre_authorization.description: Grants a time-limited pre-authorization to the integrator (see REQUIREMENTS §4.3). Within this window the integrator can open a connection without further confirmation.

expires_in_hours.name: Valid for (hours)
expires_in_hours.description: Time window during which the pre-authorization remains active.

max_duration_hours.name: Maximum session duration (hours)
max_duration_hours.description: Maximum duration of a single remote-access session.

close_tunnel.name: Close tunnel
close_tunnel.description: Immediately closes an open remote-access tunnel and ends the running maintenance session (see REQUIREMENTS §4.4). A new request is required for further access.

confirm_request.name: Confirm connection request
confirm_request.description: Accepts or rejects a pending connection request from the integrator. The request_id comes from the persistent notification.

duration_hours.name: Actual duration (hours)
duration_hours.description: Optional — can shorten the duration proposed by the integrator.
